title: Cobb's Comedy Club - All You SHOULD Know Before ...
content: Huge space and seats were relatively comfortable, not too crammed. Good view from anywhere. Service was a little slow to start but overall fun experience.

title: Cobb's Comedy Club Photos
content: Service was quick and easy. I didn't eat there but my friend did and he enjoyed his Cobb salad and mixed drink. Said it was good.

title: COBB'S COMEDY CLUB - San Francisco

title: Step Inside: Cobb's Comedy Club in San Francisco, CA
content: Cobb's Comedy Club has brought plenty of laughs to San Francisco since opening in 1982 as Cobb's Pub on Chestnut Street in the picturesque Marina District.
